source_basis: TEXBAT static receiver spoofing battery category
description: abrupt navigation-solution takeover with a large horizontal offset
position and receiver-clock error ramp together after takeover

source_basis: TEXBAT ds3-style gradual low-magnitude carry-off category
description: slow coherent position and clock drift intended to stay under one-shot thresholds

source_basis: TEXBAT ds7-style subtle phase-aligned time-push category
description: small position drift paired with persistent receiver-clock bias

source_basis: public UAV attack dataset / GPS-SDR-SIM + SDR spoofing category
description: moderate carry-off similar to a software-defined spoofer takeover

source_basis: GPS disruption followed by stale or held navigation solution category
description: GPS position is frozen at spoof onset while the inertial reference keeps moving
cross-track displacement that would pull guidance toward a wrong turn
along-track displacement that makes the vehicle believe it is farther along route

source_basis: intermittent spoofing category used to probe detector reset behavior
description: carry-off is pulsed on and off to test whether persistence survives gaps
